ai_chat.query: How much money will it cost for Hallman now and in the future to clean up this mess

response.content: The financial burden faced by Hallman Inc. for the cleanup of the Exafluoran contamination in Bryn Bower is substantial and ongoing.

response.title: Leaked Confidential Document: Hallman Cleanup Cost Estimates
response.description: This document provides a detailed analysis of the projected costs for cleaning up the environmental pollution caused by Exafluoran at the site. The cost estimates range from $4.5 million to $11 million per year, totaling between $45 million and $110 million by 2030.

response.content: The cleanup effort involves a range of strategies, including the installation of additional monitoring and extraction wells to contain and reduce the contamination.
